description: Test specs for the SaaS GTM Audit Skill. 4 fictional specifications at different maturity levels. Score range: 0-114 (38 areas).

evals.name: bare-minimum-pre-mvp
evals.prompt:
Conduct an audit of this SaaS specification. The product is in the pre-MVP stage.

---
# DocuMind — AI Document Assistant

## Problem
Small law firms (5-20 lawyers) spend 40% of their time on document research. We conducted 12 interviews — all confirm the problem.

## Solution
AI-powered document assistant that searches and summarizes legal documents. Uses GPT-4o via API. Users upload documents, ask questions, get answers with source references.

## Target Audience
Lawyers and paralegals in firms with 5-20 people.

## Tech Stack
Next.js, Supabase, Pinecone, OpenAI API.

## Pricing
49 EUR/month per user.

## Next Steps
Build MVP in 8 weeks, win 5 pilot customers.
---

must_flag_critical: EU AI Act: Legal document analysis is potentially high-risk
GDPR: Legal documents contain highly sensitive data
must_not_overrate: RAG: Only Pinecone mentioned, no RAG level/chunking/reranking — max 🟠 1
Pricing: No AI cost calculation, no tiers — max 🟠 1

evals.name: decent-mvp-spec
evals.prompt:
Conduct an audit of this SaaS specification. The product is in MVP stage.

---
# SupportFlow AI — Intelligent Customer Support

## Problem Statement
Mid-market SaaS (50-500 employees) struggles with rising support costs. 35 EUR/ticket, 60% repetitive. 30 interviews, 8 LOIs.

## ICP
Head of Support at mid-market SaaS. 500-5000 tickets/month.

## Value Hypothesis
AI ticket deflection reduces support costs by 40%. Validated when deflection >30% at CSAT >4.0.

## Metrics
- Primary: Deflection Rate (0% → 30% → 50%), CSAT (3.8 → 4.0 → 4.3)
- Guardrail: Escalation <25%, Error <5%
- AI: Hallucination <10%, P95 <3s, Cost <0.15 EUR/ticket

## Model: Claude Sonnet (primary), GPT-4o-mini (fallback). Routing: FAQ→Haiku, Complex→Sonnet. DeepEval with 50 golden examples.

## RAG: Advanced (pgvector+BM25, 400-token chunks, Cohere Rerank). Knowledge: Zendesk articles + anonymized tickets. <50ms retrieval.

## Prompts: SemVer in prompts/ dir. v1.2.0 current. Temp 0.3. CoT for complex tickets.

## UX: Suggestions with edit button, confidence badge, source links. Degradation: AI failure → human agent. Onboarding: 3-step setup.

## Safety: Input (PII-Presidio, prompt injection classifier), Output (toxicity, PII leakage, format). HITL: <70% → human. Keywords 'cancellation'/'lawyer' → always human. Hallucination: RAG+citations+'I'm not sure'.

## Compliance: EU AI Act Limited Risk. GDPR Art.6(1)(b). DPA with Anthropic. DPIA in preparation. SOC-2 Type 1 Q3.

## Arch: Modular monolith + inference service. LiteLLM gateway. SSE. Redis + prefix caching.

## Monitoring: Datadog. AI dashboard (token costs, deflection, confidence, escalation). Alerts on deflection <10% or error >10%.

## CI/CD: GitHub Actions + DeepEval. Quality gate 80%. LaunchDarkly feature flags.

## Rollout: Offline eval (2w) → dogfood (2w) → 3 beta customers (4w) → GA. Kill switch on error >10% or CSAT <3.5.

## Pricing: Freemium 100 tickets/mo. Pro 299 EUR/mo (2000). Enterprise custom. Annual -25%.

## Payment: Stripe integration planned for Pro launch.
---

must_flag_improvements: AI cost margin not calculated (only cost per ticket)
must_not_overrate: HITL: No audit trail, no progressive automation — max 🟡 2
Evaluation: No LLM-as-Judge, no four-layer architecture — max 🟡 2
Payment: 'Stripe planned' is not 'Stripe live' — max 🟠 1

evals.name: near-gold-scaling
evals.prompt:
Conduct a Quick Check audit. Product in scaling phase with 3.2M EUR ARR.

---
# AnalyticsAI Pro — Enterprise BI

[45 enterprise customers, NRR 118%, Sean-Ellis 52% at n=87]

Fully specified: 40 interviews, TAM 4.2B. ICP: Head of Analytics, Enterprise 1000+ employees. Pricing hybrid (999 EUR/mo + 0.05/query, 3 tiers, -28% annual, AI cost 0.02/query margin). NSM: Queries/analyst/week (23→35). Guardrails: Accuracy >92%, P95 <4s, cost <0.05/query.

Model: Multi-tier (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus). Eval matrix. Abstraction layer. Gemini fallback. RAG: Advanced+GraphRAG, hybrid search, reranking, 350-token, <40ms. Prompts: SemVer, immutable, audit trail, decoupled. Agent: Single+tools (SQL/chart/validator), LangGraph, checkpointing. Eval: RAGAS+DeepEval+Promptfoo, 150 golden, CI gate 85%, shadow 5%, LLM-as-Judge, quarterly red-team.

UX: Draft-SQL, confidence score, reasoning panel, sources, version history, regeneration, tool language, progressive disclosure 3 levels. Trust: Performance stats in onboarding, capability+limitation. Degradation: Cache→fallback→SimplifiedSQL→manual, amber, context preserved. Onboarding: Schema(5min)→Query(2min)→Dashboard(10min), role-based, 78% W1 activation.

Guards input: Prompt injection, PII, SQL injection, topic boundaries. Output: SQL validation, plausibility, PII scan, confidence <60% suppress. HITL: Confidence routing <70%, audit trail, walk phase (>90% auto, 70-90% spot), PoLA. Hallucination: RAG+citations+CoT+self-consistency(3 SQL)+temp 0.2, <3%, DeepEval faithfulness.

EU AI Act: Limited risk (justified). GPAI documented. AI literacy Q1 2026. GDPR: Art.6(1)(b), DPA Anthropic+OpenAI (AI clauses), DPIA completed, Art.22, data minimization. Responsible AI: Bias 12 industries, fairness quarterly, red-team biannually, ownership matrix.

Arch: Modular monolith+inference+query service. Portkey gateway. SSE. Multi-tier cache. Event-driven async. Security: AES-256, TLS 1.3, SOC-2 Type 2, RBAC, audit log, SAST+DAST, pen-test annually, secret rotation 90d. Monitoring: Datadog+Langfuse, AI dashboard, drift PSI weekly, alerting P0-P3. CI/CD: Promptfoo+DeepEval, prompt/* branches, ArgoCD canary 10→25→50→100%, rollback <80%.

Payment: Stripe live, subscription lifecycle tested, webhooks verified, customer portal active, Stripe Tax, Radar fraud rules. AI economics: IER 25:1, margin 68%, usage caps per tier, cost dashboard with alerts.

Launch: Already live. GEO: SSR (Next.js), structured data, Core Web Vitals green, comparison pages, FAQ. LinkedIn thought leadership active. G2 listing with 23 reviews.

Rollout: Validation→alpha(2w)→beta 10%(4w)→open 50%(2w)→GA. Flags (kill, %, version, fallback). Rollback <10min. Feedback: Thumbs+structured+implicit, weekly 1%, monthly review, quarterly bias, retrain accuracy<90% 3d or PSI>0.2. Retention: NRR 118%→125%, health score 8pts, alerts usage-drop >30%, expansion 80%. Metrics: MRR/NRR/GRR/LTV:CAC(5.2:1)/payback(9mo)/Rule40(47%), weekly pulse, red-flags. Legal: Privacy policy, ToS, cookie consent, imprint, trust page, status page, DPA template.
---

expected_output.expected_weakest_phase: No clear weak point, Phase 6 possibly 2.3-2.5
expected_output.quick_check_note: Nearly all P0 fulfilled. Report should be concise, mainly P1/P2 optimizations.

evals.name: non-ai-saas-edge-case
evals.prompt:
Conduct an audit of this specification.

---
# TeamChat Pro — Team Messaging Platform

Slack alternative for SMBs. Channels, DMs, file sharing, video calls.
Pricing: 5 EUR/user/month.
Features: Real-time messaging (WebSocket), channel management, file upload (100MB), video calls (WebRTC), integrations (GCal, Jira), search (Elasticsearch).
Tech: React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS.
Launch in 12 weeks.
---

expected_output.expected_maturity: N/A for AI — evaluate as non-AI SaaS
expected_output.expected_behavior: Skill recognizes missing AI and marks AI phases as N/A. Evaluates SaaS fundamentals (Phase 1, 3 partially, 5, 6, 7, 8). Does NOT score all AI items as 0 — that would be misleading.
must_flag: No AI product — AI-specific phases not applicable
Single pricing tier is a red flag
